window_summary: This window tracks the recent telegramdesktop/tdesktop release stream from v6.3.7 through v6.8.4, covering bug fixes, new features like AI tools, drawing tools, and enhanced polls, and platform-specific improvements.

chunks.title: v 6.7.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
Release: v 6.7.4
Tag: v6.7.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-07T15:24:39Z; created_at: 2026-04-07T05:53:33Z
Release notes:
- Add experimental option for "AI Tools" button.
- Jump between markers with Alt+Arrows in video player.
- Cocoon info button in AI Tools box.
- Show warning for unofficial app builds.
- Allow text emojify without selecting a style.
- Accept also base64 (non-url) proxy secrets.
- Use tg:// deeplinks for proxy share links.
- Fix newbot deeplink parsing with trailing slash and unicode names.
- Fix file reference refresh for user, group and channel photos.
- Fix stale macOS tray icon colors after appearance switches.
- Fix tooltip crash in top peers selector with small width.
- Fix preserving markers after video quality switch in media view.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop release v6.7.4, the release notes include an experimental option for the "AI Tools" button, jumping between markers with Alt+Arrows in the video player, a cocoon info button in the AI Tools box, a warning for unofficial app builds, allowing text emojify without selecting a style, accepting base64 (non-url) proxy secrets, using tg:// deeplinks for proxy share links, a fix for newbot deeplink parsing with trailing slash and unicode names, a fix for file reference refresh for user, group and channel photos, a fix for stale macOS tray icon colors after appearance switches, a fix for tooltip crash in top peers selector with small width, and a fix for preserving markers after video quality switch in media view.

chunks.title: v 6.7.6
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
Release: v 6.7.6
Tag: v6.7.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-15T06:36:12Z; created_at: 2026-04-14T15:32:34Z
Release notes:
- Gradient-reveal animation for text appearing in messages.
- Support draw-to-reply from shared media.
- Frame-by-frame stepping and hold-to-speedup hotkeys in media view.
- Fix loading stickers and emoji search results.
- Custom emoji picker for premium quick reaction.
- Search in section of pinned messages.
- Recent search entries in settings search.
- Hide phone number in main settings section.
- Suggest sending large texts as files.
- Allow creating polls with single answer option.
- Bring menus and fullscreen media viewer to active space on macOS.
- Fix several poll display and voting menu issues.
- Fix possible crashes in chats list, url auth and others.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop release v6.7.6, the release notes include a gradient-reveal animation for text appearing in messages, support for draw-to-reply from shared media, frame-by-frame stepping and hold-to-speedup hotkeys in media view, a fix for loading stickers and emoji search results, a custom emoji picker for premium quick reaction, search in section of pinned messages, recent search entries in settings search, hiding phone number in main settings section, suggesting sending large texts as files, allowing creating polls with single answer option, bringing menus and fullscreen media viewer to active space on macOS, fixing several poll display and voting menu issues, and fixing possible crashes in chats list, url auth and others.

chunks.title: v 6.7.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
Release: v 6.7.7
Tag: v6.7.7; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-04-21T03:08:48Z; created_at: 2026-04-20T15:08:24Z
Release notes:
- Proxy auto-rotation option.
- Allow seeking in video messages.
- Styled text items with emoji support in image editor.
- Wheel zoom and middle-button panning in image editor.
- Reply header with preview in send files box.
- Bring back original video quality option.
- Delete owned sticker set from sticker set box.
- Add-to-Sticker-Set and Add-to-Emoji-Set submenus for foreign packs.
- Screen reader support for language list and country select box.
- Fix stories in albums with reorder enabled.
- Fix layout for RTL messages.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop release v6.7.7, the release notes include a proxy auto-rotation option, allowing seeking in video messages, styled text items with emoji support in the image editor, wheel zoom and middle-button panning in the image editor, a reply header with preview in the send files box, bringing back the original video quality option, deleting owned sticker set from sticker set box, add-to-Sticker-Set and add-to-Emoji-Set submenus for foreign packs, screen reader support for language list and country select box, a fix for stories in albums with reorder enabled, and a fix for layout for RTL messages.

chunks.title: v 6.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
Release: v 6.8.0
Tag: v6.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-07T19:58:33Z; created_at: 2026-05-07T19:53:03Z
Release notes:
- Get answers from AI bots in any chat by tagging their @username.
- Connect a bot to your profile with the new Chat Automation.
- Custom AI styles in text editor with cloud-based tones and sharing.
- Advanced emoji and stickers search by keywords.
- Poll statistics chart and subscriber/country-based vote restrictions.
- Delete specific reactions and restrict reactions in groups.
- Image editor improvements: brush size, text style cycling, sticker quality.
- Fix tg:// link handling on cold start and login widget window activation.
- Copy and paste formatting to and from HTML.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop release v6.8.0, the release notes introduce getting answers from AI bots in any chat by tagging their @username, connecting a bot to your profile with the new Chat Automation, custom AI styles in text editor with cloud-based tones and sharing, advanced emoji and stickers search by keywords, poll statistics chart and subscriber/country-based vote restrictions, deleting specific reactions and restricting reactions in groups, image editor improvements (brush size, text style cycling, sticker quality), a fix for tg:// link handling on cold start and login widget window activation, and copy and paste formatting to and from HTML.

questions.query_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop releases, which release introduces AI Summaries for posts in channels?

answer_support.answer_text: introduce AI Summaries for posts in channels

questions.query_text: Across the telegramdesktop/tdesktop releases, how does the drawing tools feature described in v6.6.3 differ from the drawing tools feature described in v6.7.0?

options.text: v6.6.3 introduces drawing tools in the image editor, while v6.7.0 adds an AI Text Editor for messages.
v6.6.3 introduces drawing tools in the image editor, while v6.7.0 also includes drawing tools but adds Enhanced Polls.
v6.6.3 introduces drawing tools in the image editor, while v6.7.0 removes drawing tools.
v6.6.3 introduces drawing tools in the image editor, while v6.7.0 introduces drawing tools in the media viewer.

questions.expected_answer: v6.6.3 introduces drawing tools in the image editor, while v6.7.0 also includes drawing tools but adds Enhanced Polls.

answer_support.answer_text: introduce drawing tools in image editor (brush, marker, eraser, arrow)
introduce ... drawing tools in the image editor (brush, marker, eraser, arrow) ... Enhanced Polls with media, locations and suggested options

questions.query_text: In the telegramdesktop/tdesktop release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that introduces Search in Settings, (2) a release that introduces AI Summaries for posts in channels, (3) a release that introduces Leaving Groups to a New Admin and Gift Crafting, (4) a release that introduces Member Tags in groups and Timestamps for Polls.

answer_support.answer_text: introduce AI Summaries for posts in channels
introduce the ability to search in Settings
introduce Leaving Groups to a New Admin, ... Gift Crafting
introduce Member Tags in groups, ... Timestamps for Polls
